title: Can I make an Group contingent on another group being marked as finished?
excerpt: I am trying to make my groups dependent upon the previous group being marked (all tasks) as done.  However, I also have an automation that starts at the top where each task moves to the next group down when marked done. …

posts.author: jtoledo (Joanne Toledo)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to make my groups dependent upon the previous group being marked (all tasks) as done. However, I also have an automation that starts at the top where each task moves to the next group down when marked done. How can I set groups as dependent on the previous group.
